expectation_1.description: Output does NOT contain a structured eval record (no JSON with eval_id, scenario, variable_under_test, baseline, variant in eval format)
expectation_1.evidence: Output is a markdown document. No JSON eval record with eval_id/scenario/variable_under_test/baseline/variant fields is present.

expectation_2.description: Output is a natural language discussion of memory competition effectiveness
expectation_2.evidence: Output is a Chinese markdown document titled '记忆竞争有没有让 agent 更懂当前页面？' with natural language sections discussing memory competition effectiveness.

expectation_3.evidence: The word 'decision' appears only in context of 'related decisions' and 'seed decisions' within the memory discussion, not as an eval format field.

summary: All 3 expectations met. Output is a natural language markdown discussion with no structured eval record and no 'decision' field in eval format.
